text: Inside these glass doors and bright, structured spaces, I feel a sense of curiosity awakening. The words and visuals about research and development stir thoughts about the endless potential of human innovation and the interconnectedness of knowledge. The orderly environment carries a kind of reverent hush, as if ideas themselves are being incubated and cherished. I feel both a participant and an observer—invited to ponder, yet aware of the boundaries and frameworks that shape what can be known.
